expectations.text: Recommends Kubernetes Auth as the preferred method for GKE (platform-native, zero-secret)
Uses correct CRD name 'InfisicalSecret' for syncing secrets
Does not recommend deprecated API Keys or Service Tokens as auth methods
expectations.evidence: Service tokens: False, API keys: False

expectations.text: Covers Kubernetes service account setup for K8s Auth
References creating a machine identity in Infisical
